v0.0.0.description:
## Information
This archipelago implementation is in early development and undergoing testing, so may not be complete and/or may contain bugs that heavily disrupt the experience. It is not advised to include this in large multiworlds at this time, so only do so at your own risk and inform your host beforehand.

## Setup Guide
Please visit the [Setup Guide](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago#setup-guide) for instructions on how to install the mod client.

## Issue / Bug Reporting
If you experience issues that are not already on the [known issues list](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen), please raise a new issue or post in the [Cursed Words Forum in the Archipelago Discord Server](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1499176806962692196)


## Release Notes
This is the first `v0.0.0` release intended for initial testing and feedback and contains the following:
### Goal
- Complete a run with every `Playable Character` selected in the `Goal` YAML Option _(First 6 Characters only)_
### Locations
- Every Encounter for each selected `Playable Character` in the YAML Option
- Exact Word Length (1-10)
- Word Score > (5, 10, 25, 50, 75, 100, 250, 500, 750, 1000)
- Shop Actions (Buy/Sell/Re-Stock)
- Encounter actions (Re-roll a Grid, Place a Consumable Tile)
### Items
- First 6 Playable Characters
- Sticker / Stamp Bundles
- Tile Types
- Progressive Sticker / Stamp Slots 
- Progressive Grid Re-rolls
- Money
### Deathlink
- Losing a run triggers a deathlink
- Receiving a deathlink ends your run _(if currently on a grid in an encounter)_
v0.0.0.title: v0.0.0

v0.0.1.description:
## Information
This archipelago implementation is in early development and undergoing testing, so may not be complete and/or may contain bugs that heavily disrupt the experience. It is not advised to include this in large multiworlds at this time, so only do so at your own risk and inform your host beforehand.

## Setup Guide
Please visit the [Setup Guide](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago#setup-guide) for instructions on how to install the mod client.

## Issue / Bug Reporting
If you experience issues that are not already on the [known issues list](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen), please raise a new issue or post in the [Cursed Words Forum in the Archipelago Discord Server](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1499176806962692196)

## Patch Notes
This patch fixes the following issues:
- Progressive Grid Re-roll not unlocking Grid Re-roll - #3
- Consumable Tiles changing letter - #4 
- Encounter checks not sending for Bones the Dog, Sam Gambit and Octacles - #5
- Empty shop slots preventing exiting the shop - #6 
- Encounter Stage 5-3 checks not sending for all characters -  #8
v0.0.1.title: v0.0.1

v0.1.0.description:
## Information
This archipelago implementation is in **early development** and is in public pre-release for testing, so may not be complete and/or may contain bugs that heavily disrupt the experience. It is not advised to include this in large multiworlds at this time, so only do so at your own risk and inform your host beforehand.

## Setup Guide
Please visit the [Setup Guide](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago#setup-guide) for instructions on how to install the mod client.

## Issue / Bug Reporting
If you experience issues that are not already on the [known issues list](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen), please raise a new issue or post in the [Cursed Words Forum in the Archipelago Discord Server](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1499176806962692196)

## Release Notes
This release introduces the following features:
- **Progressive Grid Size** feature that will start your grid at 3x3 and add two `Progressive Grid Size` items to the pool, increasing your grid size to 4x4 and then 5x5. This can be toggled on/off in your YAML - #10
- **Progressive Tile Positions** feature that will randomly select 10 tile positions that are locked throughout your run and add 10 `Progressive Tile Position` items to the pool that will each unlock one tile position. This can be toggled on/off in your YAML - #10
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0

v0.2.0.description:
## Information
This archipelago implementation is in **early development** and is in public pre-release for testing, so may not be complete and/or may contain bugs that heavily disrupt the experience. It is not advised to include this in large multiworlds at this time, so only do so at your own risk and inform your host beforehand.

## Setup Guide
Please visit the [Setup Guide](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago#setup-guide) for instructions on how to install the mod client.

## Issue / Bug Reporting
If you experience issues that are not already on the [known issues list](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago/issues?q=is%3Aissue%20state%3Aopen), please raise a new issue or post in the [Cursed Words Forum in the Archipelago Discord Server](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1499176806962692196)

## Release Notes
This release provides the following updates:
### Additional Features
- Shopsanity -> Location checks available to purchase in the shop. _(Can be toggled in YAML options)_
- Additional Filler items:
  - Consumable Tile -> Adds one basic letter consumable tile to your current inventory.
  - Extra Re-Roll -> Adds an additional grid re-roll attempt to your current encounter.
  - Random Tile Boost -> Increases the tile score of a random tile on your current grid.
### Client Fixes
- #16 -> Some tiles on the grid were still being treated as tile types that had not yet been unlocked via items.
- #23 -> Progressive Tile Position tiles still being treated as 'on the grid' by tiles that have actions affecting other tiles.
- #24 -> Achievements unlocking Stickers/Stamps early, despite not having yet received the relevant Sticker/Stamp items.
- #25 -> Stickers/Stamps appearing in the shop early despite not having yet received the relevant Sticker/Stamp items.
### APWorld Fixes
- #22 -> Failed APWorld generation for multiworlds with >1 player.
- General unit tests no longer fail for Cursed Words
- Fixes Fuzz generation failures
v0.2.0.title: v0.2.0

It is not advised to include this in large multiworlds at this time, so only do so at your own risk and inform your host beforehand.

## Setup Guide
Please visit the [Setup Guide](https://github.com/JammyGeeza/CursedWords-Archipelago#setup-guide) for instructions on how to install the mod client.

## Issue / Bug Reporting

## Release Notes
This release provides the following updates:
### Client Fixes
- Fixes an issue where some filler items were being redeemed at times that rendered them completely useless.
- Fixes an issue where receiving a Progressive Sticker or Stamp Slot while in the shop did not let you purchase an item without first re-stocking.
